nodes.text: My address? Four twelve Birchwood Lane. I've been there since nineteen eighty-three. Forty-one years in the same house. My children keep saying I should downsize.

responses.text: That matches what we have on file.

nodes.text: Well, of course it does. I haven't moved since Gerald Ford was president. The neighbors have changed four times over but I'm still there.

responses.text: Forty-one years. That's impressive. Everything checks out.

nodes.text: Me? Heavens, no. I wouldn't know where to put forty years of books. Four twelve Birchwood Lane. Same mailbox, same oak tree, same everything.
Thank you, dear. I'll just finish my candy and wait for the prescription. No rush.
